qa_pairs.question: What is the primary configuration required when setting up Git on a new system?
qa_pairs.answer: When you begin developing on a new system, you need to configure your name and email address, as this information will be associated with every Git commit you make.

qa_pairs.question: What is an important privacy consideration when configuring your name and email for Git commits?
qa_pairs.answer: The name and email address you configure for your Git commits will become public if you push your revisions to a public repository.
